globalMeta.title: BJHUNT — AI-Powered Offensive Security Platform
globalMeta.description: BJHUNT unifies offensive security tooling, orchestration, and evidence-driven reporting into one AI-powered platform. Enterprise-grade pentesting, zero infrastructure, real-time results.
globalMeta.ogDescription: Integrated offensive security platform. Orchestrated tooling, AI-driven detection, real-time reporting. Built for modern security teams.

contactMeta.title: Contact — BJHUNT
contactMeta.description: Get in touch with the BJHUNT team for security audits, partnerships, and beta access.
contactMeta.ogDescription: Reach the BJHUNT team for engagement scoping, beta access, or partnership inquiries.

hero.title: The Future of Offensive Security
hero.description: BJHUNT unifies offensive tooling, intelligent orchestration, and evidence-driven reporting into a platform engineered for speed and precision. Powered by the specialized BJHUNT 27B model trained on billions of cybersecurity data points, we eliminate false positives and reduce detection time to minutes. Zero infrastructure to manage, zero complex setup: everything runs from your browser, with isolated sandboxes spun up on demand.

toolsRail.title: No more expensive tools. No more heavy machines.
toolsRail.description: 15 offensive security tools pre-configured and orchestrated from a single interface. No installation, no complex licensing, no VMs to manage.

features.title: Everything you need to run
features.description: Six pillars powering the next generation of offensive security operations.

orchestration.title: Intelligent Orchestration
orchestration.description: BJHUNT 27B coordinates multi-agent workflows, tool routing, and evidence collection with zero manual handoffs. The model analyzes attack surfaces in real time, determines the optimal execution sequence, and dynamically adapts scope based on intermediate findings. The result is a fluid, coherent, and fully documented offensive chain.

toolchain.title: Integrated Toolchain
toolchain.description: Nmap, Nuclei, Burp Suite, Nessus, Invicti, and ten other major tools are pre-configured and orchestrated from a single control plane. No more juggling multiple licenses, manual updates, or system dependencies. Each tool launches in its own isolated, versioned environment, ready to run.

reporting.title: Real-Time Reporting
reporting.description: Professional audit reports are generated while the scan runs, in any language. Every finding is backed by reproducible evidence, precise CVSS scoring, and actionable remediation guidance. Executive summaries and compliance packages are produced automatically, with no manual writing required.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
security.description: Complete tenant isolation with dedicated storage, ephemeral sandboxes, and distinct API boundaries. Every action is traced in an immutable audit trail, timestamped and signed. SAML/OIDC single sign-on and role-based access control provide governance suited to regulated environments.

infrastructure.title: Zero Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: No local machines to provision, no Docker images to maintain, no networks to configure. Scans launch directly from the browser into isolated sandboxes, hosted and managed by BJHUNT. You focus on results; we handle the invisible infrastructure.

compliance.title: ASVS & Compliance Ready
compliance.description: Assessments are aligned with the OWASP ASVS standard, with built-in reporting frameworks for PCI-DSS, ISO 27001, SOC 2, and GDPR. Every deliverable includes signed, traceable evidence packages ready for external auditors, with no additional tooling needed.

stat1.label: of businesses face targeted attacks every year

stat2.label: average time to detect a breach (IBM 2024)

stat3.label: average cost of a data breach

stat4.label: of critical flaws discovered in under 24h with automation

cta.title: Ready to replace fragmented
cta.description: BJHUNT brings your offensive security workflow into a single, intelligent platform. Early access is limited to selected teams and security leaders.
cta.note: Early access limited to selected teams, security leaders, and pilot programs.

pricing.heroDescription: Start with a free scan. Scale to enterprise-grade coverage. No hidden fees, no surprises.

free.name: Free
free.description: Try BJHUNT with one free scan included.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For security teams that need regular coverage.

pricing.supportText: Our team responds within 24 business hours on pricing, migration, and enterprise deployment.

technology.heroDescription: A purpose-built orchestration engine, isolated sandbox execution, and a specialized AI model trained for offensive security.

model.title: BJHUNT 27B
model.description: A specialized model trained exclusively for offensive security operations. Not a general-purpose chatbot — BJHUNT 27B understands attack surfaces, vulnerability chains, and remediation strategies natively.

orchestration.title: Multi-Agent
orchestration.description: Seventeen specialized agents work together like an experienced pentest team. Each agent masters a domain — reconnaissance, exploitation, analysis, cloud, defense — coordinated by a central orchestrator.

sandbox.title: Isolated
sandbox.description: Every test runs in an ephemeral, isolated environment. Zero risk to production infrastructure. Destructive testing possible with full safety. Network-isolated containers with middleware whitelists.
sandbox.diagramCaption: EPHEMERAL CONTAINER · NETWORK ISOLATION · CLEAN TEARDOWN

reporting.title: Evidence-Driven
reporting.description: Professional reports generated in real-time as scans execute. Evidence-backed findings, CVSS scoring, remediation guidance, and executive summaries — in any language.

about.heroDescription: BJHUNT was founded to solve the fragmentation, cost, and operational overhead that plague modern security teams. We build the platform we wished existed.

mission.title: Make offensive security
mission.description: We believe that every organization deserves enterprise-grade security testing — without the enterprise-grade complexity, cost, or headcount.

team.title: Built by security engineers
team.description: Our team combines deep offensive security expertise with AI engineering. We've worked on red teams, built security products, and trained models — we know what production pentesting actually requires.

security.heroDescription: BJHUNT is built with security-first principles. Every architectural decision starts with the question: what does a production pentest platform need to be safe?

isolation.title: Tenant Isolation
isolation.description: Complete data and execution isolation between tenants. Every organization runs in its own logical boundary with dedicated storage, sandbox environments, and API scopes.

auditTrails.title: Immutable Audit Trails
auditTrails.description: Every action — scans, findings, configurations, user operations — is recorded in an immutable audit log. Timestamped, signed, and exportable for compliance evidence.

sso.title: SSO & RBAC
sso.description: SAML/OIDC single sign-on with granular role-based access control. Define who can launch scans, view findings, export reports, or manage configurations.

encryption.title: Encryption Everywhere
encryption.description: Data encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). API keys hashed with bcrypt. Secrets never logged, never exposed.

sandboxSecurity.title: Sandbox Security
sandboxSecurity.description: Ephemeral containers with network isolation, middleware whitelists, and automatic teardown. No data persists between sessions. No cross-tenant access possible.

compliance.title: Compliance Ready
compliance.description: Aligned with OWASP ASVS, PCI-DSS, ISO 27001, SOC 2, and GDPR frameworks. Evidence packages and reporting designed to pass audits without additional tooling.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.heading: Let's Talk
contact.lede: Questions about BJHUNT? Want to discuss an integration? Our team responds within 24-48 hours.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.confirmationMsg: Your message has been sent. We will respond at
contact.faq1q: What is the average response time?
contact.faq1a: We respond to all requests within 24-48 business hours. For technical emergencies, use support@bjhunt.com.
contact.faq2q: How do I request a personalized demo?
contact.faq2a: Select 'Request a demo' in the form above. We'll schedule a call to present BJHUNT based on your specific needs.
contact.faq3q: Do you offer special rates for startups?
contact.faq3a: Yes, contact us with details about your startup. We have preferential programs for early-stage companies.
